details.test: Task 1: Highest-discount starter bundle under $120 to cart
Task 2: Main anti-aging product subscription, every 30 days
Task 3: Quiz -> one-time recommended item under $100 to cart
Task 4: Single bottle with Resveratrol + Collagen, caffeine-free, under $70
Task 5: Clinical study 40–60, >=8 weeks -> open product detail
Task 6: Filter reviews 50–59, open regimen from second review
Task 7: Two items + 3–5 day shipping under $15 -> payment stage
Task 8: Contact form - product safety question about Vitamin D
Task 9: Newsletter signup with topics and weekly frequency
